title: Pro API Modules Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Pro API external service modules (modules_config.json). Top-level keys are either URL path prefix groups (e.g. 'services') with forwarded external modules, or composite Blockscout groups (e.g. 'blockscout') that combine a Blockscout swagger spec with nested service specs.

swaggerUrl.description: URL of the service's OpenAPI 2.0 / 3.x spec (JSON or YAML) used to build the endpoint trie.

apiKey.description: How the service API key is attached to forwarded requests. Omit or set to null to forward without an API key.

location.description: Where the API key is attached on forwarded requests.

param_name.description: Name of the header or query parameter used for the API key (e.g. 'x-api-key').

env_var.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the API key value.

forwardedServiceModule.description: Per-module configuration for an external service forwarded by Pro API.

description.description: Human-readable description of the module, exposed via GET /api/json/endpoints.

service_url.description: Base URL of the external service that matched requests are forwarded to.

root.description: If true, the module is also registered at the root of the endpoint trie and reachable as /<module_name>/... (in addition to /<prefix>/<module_name>/...).

allowed_paths.description: Regex patterns applied to the full spec path; only operations matching at least one pattern are exposed.

blockscoutNestedService.description: Nested service spec merged into a Blockscout group (no direct request forwarding).

description.description: Human-readable description of the nested service, exposed via GET /api/json/endpoints.

pathPrefixGroup.description: URL path prefix group. Each key is a module name routed under this prefix (e.g. /<prefix>/<module_name>/...).

blockscoutGroup.description: Blockscout composite group: a Blockscout swagger spec plus nested service specs (e.g. stats).

services.description: Nested services whose swagger specs are merged with the Blockscout spec.
